name: tag-platform
description: t@g — run the backend, product app and admin app together

scripts.start-all: concurrently -k -n backend,product,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm --prefix DMM_backend run dev" "npm --prefix DMM_frontend run dev" "npm --prefix DMM_Admin run dev"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --prefix DMM_backend install && npm --prefix DMM_frontend install && npm --prefix DMM_Admin install
